info:
** EFI SYSTEM **

Bootloader install:
mkdir -p /boot/EFI/limine
cp /usr/share/limine/BOOT{X64,IA32}.EFI /boot/EFI/limine/

Bootloader EFI entry:
efibootmgr \
  --create \
  --disk /dev/sdX \
  --part Y \
  --label "sauzerOS Limine" \
  --loader '\EFI\limine\BOOT{X64,IA32}.EFI' \
  --unicode

** BIOS SYSTEM **
mkdir -p /boot/limine
cp /usr/share/limine/limine-bios.sys /boot/limine/
limine bios-install /dev/sdX (BIOS with MBR)
limine bios-install /dev/sdX partition_number (BIOS with GPT)

** CONFIGURATION **
limine.conf

timeout: 5

/sauzerOS
    protocol: linux
    path: boot():/vmlinuz-xxx
    cmdline: root=UUID=xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx rw
    module_path: boot():/initramfs-xxx.img

/Windows
    protocol: efi
    path: boot():/EFI/Microsoft/Boot/bootmgfw.efi
